workshop.title: Bob-a-thon: Enterprise AI Development Workshop
workshop.subtitle: Learn how IBM Bob transforms enterprise development from weeks to minutes
workshop.description: A hands-on workshop with real code, real compliance, and measurable results.
workshop.overview_desc: Bob-a-thon is a hands-on workshop that demonstrates IBM Bob's enterprise capabilities through a realistic scenario: implementing SSO + MFA across 3 legacy systems to pass a SOC 2 audit. Experience firsthand how Bob transforms 7-8 weeks of traditional development into 10 minutes of AI-powered orchestration.
workshop.objective_1: Understand how Bob reads and interprets business requirements documents
workshop.objective_2: Experience multi-repository orchestration across different tech stacks
workshop.objective_3: See compliance automation in action (SOC 2, PCI-DSS)
workshop.objective_4: Witness security vulnerabilities caught and fixed inline
workshop.objective_5: Learn deployment planning with zero-downtime strategies
workshop.objective_6: Explore Bobalytics for cost transparency and productivity tracking
workshop.prereq_1: Access to IBM Bob (request via IBM Client Engineering)
workshop.prereq_2: Basic understanding of enterprise development concepts
workshop.prereq_3: Familiarity with Git and multi-repository workflows (helpful but not required)
workshop.setup_step1_desc: Access the seller_deep_dive repository containing all workshop materials
workshop.setup_step2_desc: Familiarize yourself with the workshop structure and objectives
workshop.setup_step3_desc: Launch IBM Bob in your preferred IDE or web interface
workshop.setup_step4_desc: Work through each stage at your own pace, from Stage 0 to Stage 9
workshop.material_2: Existing codebase across 3 repositories (Java, Node.js, React)
workshop.journey_intro: Follow this progressive journey through Bob's capabilities:
workshop.stage0_desc: Start with a realistic scenario: You've been assigned to implement SSO + MFA across legacy systems to pass a SOC 2 audit. The deadline is tight, and you have a 20-page requirements document.
workshop.stage05_desc: Explore the three legacy repositories you'll be working with:
workshop.stage1: Business Requirements Analysis - Upload the PDF and let Bob extract technical requirements
workshop.stage2: Compliance Mapping - Map SOC 2 findings to specific code changes
workshop.stage3: Multi-Repo Planning - Generate implementation plan across all 3 repositories
workshop.stage4: Code Generation - Watch Bob create 17+ files with proper integration
workshop.stage5: Security Inline - See vulnerabilities caught and fixed in real-time
workshop.stage6: Test Generation - Comprehensive test suites with 94% coverage
workshop.stage9_desc: Review the complete productivity and cost analysis:
workshop.stage9_metric1: Task completion time: 10 minutes vs 7-8 weeks traditional
workshop.stage9_metric5: Security issues: 3 detected and fixed inline
workshop.technical_deliverables_desc: By the end of the workshop, you'll have generated:
workshop.deliverable_1: Complete SSO + MFA implementation across 3 repositories
workshop.deliverable_2: 17+ production-ready code files with proper integration
workshop.security_1: Hardcoded secrets replaced with environment variables
workshop.security_4: All security issues caught during generation, not after
workshop.roi_2: Bob Cost: $8.47 (actual LLM costs from Bobalytics)
workshop.path_dev_1: Work through all 9 stages at your own pace
workshop.path_dev_2: Experiment with different prompts and approaches
workshop.path_dev_3: Explore the generated code and understand Bob's decisions
workshop.path_dev_4: Try modifying requirements and see how Bob adapts
workshop.path_dev_5: Review Bobalytics to understand cost and productivity metrics
workshop.path_leaders_desc: Run the workshop as a team exercise:
workshop.path_leader_1: Allocate 60-90 minutes for the full workshop
workshop.path_leader_2: Have participants work in pairs or small groups
workshop.path_leader_3: Pause at each stage to discuss observations and insights
workshop.path_leader_4: Compare results across teams (different approaches, same outcome)
workshop.path_leader_5: Conclude with a discussion on how to integrate Bob into your workflow
workshop.path_sales_desc: Focus on business value and ROI:
workshop.path_sales_1: Review the README and Stage 9 (Bobalytics) first
workshop.path_sales_2: Understand the time and cost comparisons
workshop.path_sales_4: Use the metrics for customer conversations
workshop.path_sales_5: Reference the IBM internal success stories
workshop.cta_desc: Access the complete Bob-a-thon workshop materials and begin your hands-on journey with IBM Bob.
workshop.support_1: Access to IBM Bob for the workshop
workshop.support_2: Facilitated workshop sessions for your team
workshop.support_3: Custom workshops tailored to your use cases

ibmi.title: IBM i Platforming with Bob
ibmi.subtitle: Modernize AS/400 Legacy Systems to Cloud-Native Architecture
ibmi.description: Transform RPG, COBOL, and CL applications into modern Java microservices on OpenShift
ibmi.overview_desc: This walkthrough demonstrates Bob's IBM i platforming capabilities through a realistic scenario: transforming a legacy AS/400 system with RPG, COBOL, and 5250 green screens into a modern cloud-native application running on OpenShift.
ibmi.estimated_time_value: 20-25 minutes to complete the full IBM i platforming workflow
ibmi.download_desc: Get the complete source code, examples, and documentation to follow along
ibmi.capability_1_desc: Bob analyzes RPG, COBOL, CL programs and DB2 for i databases
ibmi.capability_2_desc: Creates comprehensive migration plan with risk assessment
ibmi.capability_3_desc: Converts RPG/COBOL to Java with Spring Boot microservices
ibmi.capability_4_desc: Migrates DB2 for i to PostgreSQL with data validation
ibmi.capability_5_desc: Transforms 5250 screens to modern React web interfaces
ibmi.capability_6_desc: Deploys to OpenShift with containerization and CI/CD
ibmi.capability_7_desc: Ensures functional parity with comprehensive testing
ibmi.section_1_challenge_desc: Understanding decades-old IBM i systems requires deep expertise in RPG, COBOL, CL, and DB2 for i. Documentation is often outdated or missing, and business logic is embedded across programs, files, and stored procedures.
ibmi.section_1_value_traditional_desc: 4-6 weeks - hire IBM i consultants, manual code review, documentation creation
ibmi.section_1_value_bob_desc: 10 minutes - comprehensive analysis with dependency mapping and modernization roadmap
ibmi.section_1_value_highlight: 99.5% faster analysis - Bob understands your entire IBM i ecosystem in minutes, including business logic that would take weeks to document manually.
ibmi.section_2_challenge_desc: IBM i modernization requires balancing business continuity with technical transformation. The wrong approach can result in failed migrations, data loss, and business disruption. A phased strategy is critical for success.
ibmi.section_2_value_traditional_desc: 2-3 weeks - consultants create plan, multiple stakeholder reviews, revisions
ibmi.section_2_value_bob_desc: 5 minutes - comprehensive roadmap with risk assessment and timelines
ibmi.section_2_value_highlight: Strategic planning at scale - Bob creates enterprise-grade IBM i modernization plans that balance technical feasibility with business constraints.
ibmi.section_3_challenge_desc: Converting RPG and COBOL to modern Java requires deep understanding of both legacy and modern paradigms. Manual conversion is extremely time-consuming and error-prone, with high risk of introducing bugs.
ibmi.section_3_value_traditional_desc: 6-12 months - manual conversion, extensive testing, multiple iterations
ibmi.section_3_value_bob_desc: 2-3 weeks - automated transformation with business logic preservation
ibmi.section_3_value_highlight: 95% faster conversion - Bob transforms RPG/COBOL to modern Java while maintaining exact business logic and adding modern capabilities.
ibmi.section_4_challenge_desc: Migrating from DB2 for i to PostgreSQL requires careful schema conversion, data type mapping, and stored procedure transformation. Data integrity and zero downtime are critical requirements.
ibmi.section_4_demo_title: Let Bob Handle Your Database Migration
ibmi.section_4_value_traditional_desc: 3-4 months - manual schema conversion, data migration scripts, extensive testing
ibmi.section_4_value_bob_desc: 2-3 weeks - automated migration with validation and zero downtime
ibmi.section_4_value_highlight: 90% faster migration - Bob handles complex database migration with automated validation and zero data loss guarantee.
ibmi.section_5_challenge_desc: 5250 green screen interfaces are functional but outdated. Modern users expect responsive web interfaces with intuitive UX. Transforming character-based screens to modern React applications requires careful UX design and implementation.
ibmi.section_5_value_traditional_desc: 4-6 months - UX design, manual screen conversion, user testing
ibmi.section_5_value_bob_desc: 3-4 weeks - automated UI generation with modern UX patterns
ibmi.section_5_value_highlight: 85% faster UI modernization - Bob transforms 5250 screens to modern React interfaces while improving user productivity and satisfaction.
ibmi.section_6_challenge_desc: Moving from IBM i to OpenShift requires containerization, orchestration, and modern DevOps practices. Setting up CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and auto-scaling is complex and time-consuming.
ibmi.section_6_value_traditional_desc: 2-3 months - manual containerization, Kubernetes setup, deployment configuration
ibmi.section_6_value_bob_desc: 1-2 weeks - automated containerization and deployment with best practices
ibmi.section_6_value_highlight: 85% faster platform migration - Bob automates the entire deployment process from containerization to production with enterprise-grade reliability.
ibmi.section_7_challenge_desc: Ensuring functional parity between legacy IBM i and modernized systems is critical. Comprehensive testing across all layers - unit, integration, performance, and user acceptance - is essential to validate the migration.
ibmi.section_7_value_traditional_desc: 6-8 weeks - manual test creation, execution, and validation
ibmi.section_7_value_bob_desc: 1-2 weeks - automated test generation with comprehensive coverage
ibmi.section_7_value_highlight: 80% faster testing - Bob generates comprehensive test suites that ensure functional parity and validate the entire migration with confidence.
